review_title: Best seo plugin for wordpress sites in 2024
description: This has been a game changer for us. We started off years ago with our WordPress site using AIOSEO, we then moved to RankMath and finally decided to try Squirrly SEO after seeing some solid reviews and an impressive price point that offered true value for money. We are not looking back at all and will definately continue using the platform for its ease of use and features that more than rival the big names.
author: Angus A.
pros: Very in depth though not overcomplicated, helpful support team, great roadmap, well designed user interface. Amazing value for money
cons: Some features such as the focus keywords section still needs a bit of work. Some of the UI is a little clunky.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Squirrly, Way beyond a good SEO tool
description: Easy, quick, very clear. It's efficient and fast. And as friendly as can be.
author: Olga S.
pros: Squirrly, for me, is indispensable! I tried several options before them. Their customer service, their efficiency, and especially, the plugin WORKS! It raises the traffic effectively and fast. I absolutely love it. And recommend it to anyone who wants their SEO to work and succeed.
cons: I cannot find a con...honestly. I need 40 characters... ok, got them.
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Supposed to be easy but it's anything but
description: Since installing this and uninstalling yoast, immediately Google has de-indexed every single page except /categories/ and /tags/ I think it's doing this because of the focus feature, which is supposed to make things easy, but if you want to do anything manual, it's just not doable.
author: Shawn P.
pros: I like how they break things into manageable tasks. You set focus pages, and the software gives you actionable items to make those come to life.
cons: It's really confusing. It's supposed to be easy, but I just can't wrap my head around it. I have been using other SEO software for many years, so I'm not new to this. And I'm confident that this software has de-indexed all of my blog posts, but has left only categories on google. I can't seem to figure it out.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Helps Ranking Higher on Google with Right Keyword Research & Search Engine Optimized Content
description: The experience is good, it shares valuable insights about user behavior. It has helped us a lot to improve our website experience for our key business stakeholders and rank higher through both organic and paid campaigns.
author: Vijeta C.
pros: Helped us to improve our lead generation process by improving our ranking on search engines. It also improved our ROI for both Paid Campaigns as well as getting higher organic traffic.
cons: Slow Results unlike paid campaigns. It needs a lot of efforts to improve SEO of our website.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Recovering Yoast addict on the path to recovery thanks to Squirrly
description: It's been overwhelmingly positive to date. Since putting the first site in place at the start of 2021, we're now adding more and more sites each week to our plan. It feels liberating to have a tool that works in the way we need it to without having to fight with a frustrating plugin (I'm looking at you, Yoast).
author: Neal B.
pros: There are plenty of reasons to like this software including: UI, ease of integration into WordPress, and the ability to add and sync keywords. However, our favorite item has got to be the Live Assistant that provides copy suggestions and edit in real time. This was something that used to be up to "debate" in client meetings. When a client feels they know how to write effective copy, any critique is met with frustration. With the Live Assistant, the AI lets the client know in real time what will work and what sounds "clunky" which has freed up a great deal of time in weekly meetings.
cons: We're still working to figure a few items out on the backend but being able to white label the admin and provide individual logins for each user would be a big win.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Squirrly SEO is a Game Changer
description: It is not often that I leave a review, but Squirrly SEO is very well deserving of this. I am a WP-heavy user, and I have been using Yoast SEO since a couple of years ago. I went with it because it got excellent reviews and seemed like the SEO package that everyone is using. But I never really knew how well I was doing when using Yoast SEO. I could search on my keywords and see where I ranked, but Yoast SEO never gave me any insight on how I could actually improve. Since using Squirrly, I am able to see precisely where my pages need to be polished, and I can address them immediately. Now I have a whole lot of new understanding about how to go through to try to rank, so it might take me some time before getting through them all. However, thanks to Squirrly, I have client's several pages ranking in the top 10 of Google! I am a newbie when it comes to SEO, but I am continuously learning. And Squirrly has honestly given me all the tools I need to make my site rank better. If you are on the fence about purchasing Squirrely, just do it. You will not be disappointed.
author: Chandra R K.
pros: Squirrly offers the Complete SEO Funnel and it offers Cloud Services + Wordpress Plugin, meaning that Squirrly SEO will work both for optimizing either WordPress-based websites and non-WordPress websites.
cons: Keyword research feature Squirrly SEO offered is pretty basic and need a bit of upgrading.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great SEO product and replacement of SEO Yoast
description: I like it so far, I'm going to implement on my other sites soon so excited to do that and get my SEO up.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: SEO Yoast is great and a nice product BUT I feel some of their features are basic - Squirrly SEO has a lot more features and optimization power I feel then Yoast premium. I've used both for a while now. Yoast was giving me issues updating too and messed up my SEO that I had built up for months so not happy with them.
cons: The User interface could be more intuitive and easy for users.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Hidden gem among popular WordPress SEO tools
description: Squirrly SEO helps me with my websites' SEO routine greatly. It has a lot of features that are useful for any website whether it is powered by WordPress or not. I have already seen some improvements in my website rankings but I know proper SEO will take many months before considerable results can be seen. So far, I am happy with Squirrly SEO.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Squirrly SEO is a powerful WordPress SEO plugin coupled with a cloud-based service that allows non-WordPress sites to improve their SEO rankings as well. What's really great about this plugin is that if you have been using its competitors like RankMath or Yoast, you can import all settings and data from these plugins into Squirrly. Actually, the developers claim one can use Squirrly SEO alongside RankMath or Yoast simultaneously with some exceptions in mind. At first, it may look overwhelming when you just start using the plugin as there are numerous settings that you are offered to tweak. However, you should not expect an easy SEO journey if you take it seriously. Basically, you will have to tweak the setting only once and then you just turn things on or off, adjust them and see what works best for your website. You can also follow the suggestions the plugin gives regarding the improvements you should make to your website.
cons: I don't see any significant cons. The only thing I would love to see improved is their UI. It looks outdated and a good UI revamp would be a nice thing to have.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Awesome SEO Plugin
description: It's ideal for those who aren't experts in SEO but want to provide a little something more to their clientele.
author: Cherarajan K.
pros: UI nearly turns SEO into a game, making it simple to optimise each website and post individually or in bulk. Deep Keyword Research is a nifty feature.
cons: UI needs to be updated and there are some bugs here and there.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Best SEO Plugin for WordPress
description: I am satisfied with Squirrly SEO. It is lightweight, unlike SEO Yoast, and very versatile. It is also very good for Local SEO. The premium package is worth buying.
author: Bikram K. S.
pros: This is the best SEO plugin out there for WordPress. More than a plugin, this is a complete SEO suite. It helps you with keyword research and content optimization. The best part of the plugin is the Focus Pages feature. It scans your page and gives you a probability of ranking for a given keyword. It also shares valuable guides on steps to take in order to make the page/article rank for the chosen keyword. The AI factor is very good. It's live assistant and AI is great.
cons: The number of focus pages in my package is less. It should be more. The UI needs some work. On this, it should take a leaf out from Rank Math SEO plugin.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Squirrly SEO is my secret SEO weapon!
author: Ivan R.
pros: Squirrly's tools are simple to use, highly intuitive and super fast; providing the best SEO available. What I like the most about Squirrly SEO is can be used for free through Squirrly. Squirrly SEO is comparable to other more expensive products in the SEO market. I find Squirrly SEO to be an economical SEO software, providing both time and money savings. The range of SEO tools available with Squirrly SEO are comparable to other more expensive products in the market. Squirrly SEO is my go to tool at the time I want a trusted SEO report. I'm glad I bought it! It has become my secret SEO weapon!
cons: Somehow a little bit limited in comparison to other, more expensive products
author_profession: Attorney at Law and and Entrepreneur
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: I Never Knew What I Was Missing
description: When I put up my WordPress website, I decided that I would take some of the suggestions that had been made to me over the years. However, in the past, when I used a product and had a difficulty, it took forever to get a response from the administrators of that product. Sometimes it has been so bad I had stopped working on a project and couldn't remember why I contacted them anymore. I have now aligned myself with a group of guys who actually respond to questions and difficulties. Squirrly gets back to me with the exact answer I need. I have never been disappointed once in the last few months that I've been using the SEO product. I'm working my way through the training videos and attempting to put everything I understand, into practice on my website/blog.
author: Linda W.
pros: The software is easy to install and easy to access the results. When I log on to my website, the results are right there. I also like the fact that every report tells me where I'm failing to use best practices with the SEO suggestions. I never knew what I was missing. I had written blogs before and actually built some websites, but they never took off and I truly did not know why. Now, when my numbers are down, Squirrly immediately tells me what I need to do to "fix" it and they also tell me what's succeeding so I keep doing what works.
cons: There is nothing I like least. If there is nothing I dislike, I can't exactly answer this question. The truth is, there is nothing I've been disatisfied with up to this point.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Best Customer Service ever!
description: Squirrly has been my favorite app for so many years but now I want to tell everyone about how awesome they are. :)
author: Tina K.
pros: I have never been so happy about customer service before. I had a problem with a plugin called staff list. It was not spitting out the title and the image when I was sharing a page on social media that I was hoping for of a dynamic page created in staff list. I was about to set up 500 manual pages for all the staff on the website and put shortcode into each when I reached out to Squirrly as a last try if they can help. And after many emails from them and lots of work on their side they got it to work today. I am blown away with [SENSITIVE CONTENT] and his teams customer service and programming knowledge and willingness to help me even though it was not their app that was not working correctly.
cons: Nothing. I love the software and customer service
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: Squirrly SEO
author: Charis K.
pros: My favorite feature is the localization automation as I can be flexible and still get business needs handled. I appreciate the convenience as my time is valuable m.
cons: I really enjoy this software as a whole.
author_duration: Used the software for: 6-12 months

review_title: Would you spend a million dollars to rank on Google? We would!
description: Hours of guess-work taken out of our SEO production process.
author: Stephan B.
pros: A bird with brilliance, built for one purpose, soaring free. Squirrly SEO is equipped with the wingspan to fly across search engine space like no other SEO product before it: crawling crossways through the mountains of A.I. that keep changing their shape so we can never find out what the newest one is called or how big they are outside your office, and diving into all of them head on while somehow trying to stay in human form when inside each sea-monster’s mouth. By decoding these changes really well and telepathically communicating this information back to our marketing team, Squirrly SEO makes sense of all web pages! Simply put: Squirrly SEO makes the entire process of achieving Google top positions much easier. It surpasses WP SEO by Yoast, which was our favorite SEO tool until now. Squirrly helps us with building focus pages, keyword research, live assistant to greenlight our content and performs site audits that offer rank tracking.
cons: The only thing that's missing it Squirrly SEO is talking to us in a human voice - and maybe the integration of NLP semantic analysis of our existing content, leading to AI-based content creation. If anyone can actually pull this off - the team of Squirrly SEO might just be that team.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: The plugin every WP site needs
description: An absolute blessing to use
author: Jeremy R.
pros: I really like how it teaches me to do seo, and it has the power to guide me while doing the work, because the tool is where the work is done and the AI assistant can analyze your work and make suggestions on the fly.
cons: Sometimes I run into not being able to find keywords to rank, so it could be cool to help find some Pre suggestions to search. Instead of waiting to the post-suggestions. But this can also be to my limited experience right now.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SEO Hidden Gem
description: So far a very good experience, better than I anticipated.
author: Luis G.
pros: I'd been using the software for a while now and I am impressed with the number of advanced features it provides. And I compare it with other professional tools I use and the quality is there, you can trust Squirrly.
cons: I think it can go deeper into competitors research and marketplace research, but that is something only advanced users would care about. But you are covered as they also have a standalone version the allows you to do exactly that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: SEO plugin
description: With the plugin, I can quickly and easily optimize the SEO for my WordPress websites. Furthermore, I can track the performance of my websites from the dashboard.
author: Subham M.
pros: Setting up Squirrly is a breeze, as the plugin provides a step-by-step guide. The user interface has been recently revamped, and it is now modern and sleek, surpassing other SEO plugins in its category. One standout feature of Squirrly is its ability to target specific pages for SEO optimization and provide actionable recommendations to improve their rankings. The built-in keyword research tool is reliable and provides comparable results to other popular tools like Ubersuggest. Another excellent feature of Squirrly is the on-page guidance, which assists users in adhering to best SEO practices.
cons: It would be convenient to have an option to easily hide the hints and tips that appear on the dashboard, not only for my account but also for other user accounts. Although this may be a feature within the plugin, I have not yet explored it and do not know how to access it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Boost Your Website's SEO with Squirrly
description: The overall experience of using Squirrly SEO is likely to be positive for most users, as the plugin provides comprehensive and easy-to-use search engine optimization tools. The keyword research and on-page optimization suggestions are likely to help website owners improve their website's ranking and visibility on search engines, and the analytics tracking and competitor analysis features provide valuable insights into website performance and competition.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Ease of use: How user-friendly the plugin is, and how easy it is to set up and use.Keyword research capabilities: How effective the keyword research tool is at finding relevant and high-traffic keywords.On-page optimization suggestions: The quality and relevance of the on-page optimization suggestions provided by the plugin.
cons: Performance on less popular search engines: The plugin's performance on search engines that have a lower market share, as long as it performs well on major search engines such as Google.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: A great alternative to Yoast
description: Overall, I like how Squirrly saved me a lot of time and hassle when it comes to optimizing my site pages for SEO and providing personalized research metrics based on my site authority rather than other ranked sites.
author: Aliff A.
pros: What I like about Squirrly plugin is that it's lightweight. When I said lightweight, the contents in the plugin are loaded from their servers rather than using my server host resources. Plus, Squirrly is like a private SEO consultant, but run by robots, a.k.a the A.I. It feels great to have the tedious tasks of pursuing technical SEO and content optimizations done automated, as well as showing me issues and providing me personalized recommendations that I need to fix on my end.
cons: The UI definitely needs some improvement as it is not as slick as Yoast or even Ahrefs (in the case of keyword research tool). Also, there will be server timeouts from time to time when doing the keyword research, and repeating the task all over again can be daunting as it means I wasted another few minutes just for that.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Squirrly SEO (A plugin for search engine optimization (SEO))
description: Squirrly SEO is an excellent tool for website owners who want to optimize their content for search engines. Its user-friendly interface, comprehensive guidance, and performance-tracking tools make it a valuable tool for improving your website's search engine rankings. Additionally, Squirrly SEO is only compatible with WordPress sites, which may be a limitation for some users.
author: Aseem S.
pros: Squirrly SEO offers comprehensive guidance on optimizing your content for search engines, including keyword research, content optimization, and tracking performance. The plugin offers keyword research tools to help you find the best keywords to target for your content. Squirrly SEO provides real-time suggestions for optimizing your content as you write, ensuring that your content is optimized for search engines. Tracking performance: The plugin offers performance tracking and analytics tools to help you measure the impact of your SEO efforts.
cons: Squirrly SEO does not integrate with all major SEO tools, which may be a drawback for users who prefer to use a broader suite of tools. Since Squirrly SEO is a WordPress plugin, it is not compatible with non-WordPress sites. While Squirrly SEO offers many features, some users may find the customization options limited.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

review_title: Great tool
description: Trying to bring more organic traffic
author: Grace L.
pros: There is almost nothing bad to say about this product it’s easy to use and will definitely help improve your site rankings and online presence if used properly
cons: Key word research leaves a lot to be desired. I wish you could choose all your own keyword variations instead of being limited to the suggestions. Suggestion are sometimes way off base
author_duration: Used the software for: 2+ years

review_title: A fantastic WP SEO plugin-Educator
description: My overall SEO experience is poor so for me was really important to find a tool that will help me with my On-Page SEO (and not only) with an easy and effective way. There are so many SEO Tools in the marketing that are really overwhelming and also not sure all this data that they provide if it is accurate. Squirrly actually addresses what you have to fix and you follow the instructions.
author: Saeed A.
pros: What i really like using Squirrly SEO tool is that it walks you through the entire SEO process of your website and also manages to educate you as well.
cons: Nothing particular. I may only mention that the UI is simple from other colleagues. But still for me is great
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great Combined On-page and Off-page SEO for both Novice and Expert users
description: It saves a lot of time by giving you suggestions and you do not need to manually set up a lot of configurations.
author: Justin Z.
pros: It lets you setup all aspects of SEO of your site very easily. Therefore, very helpful for beginners. It does the job well for what it meant to do.
cons: UI needs to be improved. All the impressive functionalities it has are pulled down by GUI and its presentation. Workflows can be improved too.
author_duration: Used the software for: 1-2 years

review_title: A Hidden Gem to Affordably and Easily Improve SEO
description: My overall experience with Squirlly has been nothing short of fantastic!
author: Stephen S.
pros: Squirrly is a very affordable and easy way to improve your website's SEO. It is easy enough for beginners and complex enough for more experienced users. It covers almost every aspect of SEO - from making improvements to your site and increase your ranking to social media integration. In other words, Squirrly is a complete SEO package. And, it's very affordable for the many benefits it has to offer.
cons: Squirrly is relatively new to SEO scene, but it is rapidly growing with new features and options being added.
